evals.prompt: Initialize documentation for my Next.js project with PostgreSQL database
evals.expected_output: Creates docs/ directory with ARCHITECTURE.md, DATABASE.md, API.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, DEVELOPER.md, STYLE_GUIDE.md, INFRASTRUCTURE.md, SECURITY.md, and README.md index
expectations: Creates DATABASE.md with schema documentation template

evals.prompt: Update the API documentation after I added new user endpoints
evals.expected_output: Updates docs/API.md with new user endpoints, request/response formats, and examples
expectations: Updates API.md with new endpoint documentation

evals.prompt: Review my project documentation for completeness
evals.expected_output: Provides a review of existing docs, identifies gaps, inconsistencies, and outdated information
expectations: Lists specific files that need updates

evals.prompt: I finished implementing the authentication feature, sync the docs
evals.expected_output: Updates relevant documentation files to reflect authentication changes - SECURITY.md, API.md, ARCHITECTURE.md
expectations: Updates ARCHITECTURE.md if auth changed system design
